\begin{table}[t]\centering\footnotesize
\caption{QMRSF ground-state total energies (Hartree). CAS(4,4) equals the QMRSF-DK dressed-kernel spectrum (DK==CAS on HF integrals); icPT2 adds the external-$Q$ correlation (EN with a $0.1$~Eh imaginary shift, and Dyall). For H$_4$ the exact FCI in the same window is shown.}
\begin{tabular}{lrrrrr}\hline
system/basis & ref ROHF & CAS$=$DK & icPT2-EN & icPT2-Dyall & FCI \\ \hline

H4/6-31g & -1.706013 & -2.151743 & -2.187565 & -2.200845 & -2.181861 \\
CBD/sto-3g & -151.492067 & -151.842968 & -151.844221 & -151.844322 & -- \\
CBD/6-31g & -153.323540 & -153.632441 & -153.652072 & -153.657059 & -- \\
\hline\end{tabular}\label{tab:bench-ground}\end{table}

\begin{table}[t]\centering\footnotesize
\caption{Spin-resolved lowest excitations (eV): the lowest triplet $T_1$ and lowest excited singlet $S_1$ above the (singlet) ground state, from per-state $\langle\hat S^2\rangle$ labels. $T_1<S_1$ in every case, so a naive energy-ordered ``state~1'' is the triplet, not $S_1$.}
